series_metadata.series_title: Complaint Investigation Files - Closed without formal disciplinary action
series_metadata.series_description: Complaint investigation files closed by Board after investigation wherein no formal disciplinary action was taken or referral to QUIP was made, containing confidential information including but not limited to: complaints filed with the Board pursuant to R.C. Chapter 4715 and documents relating to the processing and investigation of complaints such as complaint, reports of investigation, correspondence and memoranda, subpoenas, evidence, warning letters and related documents, etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: seven (7) years completed case is closed by Board ; Paper: scanned or saved into Board enforcement database
